name: Incannex Healthcare Limited American Depositary Shares
summary: Incannex Healthcare Limited is a clinical stage pharmaceutical company developing unique medicinal cannabis pharmaceutical products and psychedelic therapies for unmet medical needs. The company researches, develops, and commercializes novel therapies, focusing on areas such as obstructive sleep apnea, traumatic brain injury, anxiety disorders, and inflammatory bowel disease. Incannex is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
